primary_train.role: primary increased-data policy repair training candidate
primary_train.reason: This is the most direct increased-data candidate for teacher-divergence repair: it upgrades the earlier single-suppress formulation to multi-suppress rows.

supporting_data.role: protected group evidence for rank/top-k route
expanded teacher-divergence candidate pool / future scaling source

gate_data.role: small weighted adapter train/control set; not sufficient alone for capacity increase
heldout / family split manifest for gate design

capacity_target.name: capacity_B_b4c96_data_supported_probe_candidate
capacity_target.rationale: Capacity B is preferred for a minimal data-supported revisit because it is a known capacity-upgrade path with prior reports. It previously did not justify promotion, but those runs should not be treated as satisfying the mentor requirement because they were not cleanly paired with the current increased-data policy/multi-suppress route.

mentor_alignment.requirement: model capacity increase must correspond to increased training data
mentor_alignment.design_response: Do not run a capacity probe unless it is explicitly paired with the increased multi-suppress / teacher-divergence data side and a retention gate.

proposed_next_preflight.purpose: Discover the exact trainer/evaluator command class and verify input/output paths for a later explicitly authorized no-promotion training probe.
must_check: exact gate/eval script or static evaluator
whether capacity B initialization exists as code path
new output checkpoint path under checkpoints/probes/ only
new eval output paths under analysis/integration_eval/capacity_data_pairing_probe_preflight or similar
proposed_next_preflight.codex_note: Codex is not needed for this design. Codex may be useful after preflight if the existing training wrapper cannot express the intended capacity/data pairing safely.
